prompt:
An astronomy logbook page open on a table, showing hand-drawn stick-figure constellation sketches for Orion, Ursa Major, and Cassiopeia with simple orientation arrows and star connection lines. The drawings should look observational and practical, with pencil strokes, a red-light flashlight nearby, and perhaps a star atlas edge in the background. The page must clearly read as a compact field sketch set for memorizing patterns rather than a finished printed atlas page.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a calm near-future amateur-astronomy aesthetic: soft low-intensity night-friendly lighting, realistic paper fibers and graphite texture, muted tones, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered so it works cleanly as a sky-navigation note artifact for DSPACE.
